title: Quote of the day by Alec Baldwin's wife Hilaria Baldwin: "With breath on your side, you become alert and aware of what's really going on, not overtaken by…" - why one conscious breath can help you think more clearly
summary_full: Hilaria Baldwin suggests using breath for greater awareness and clarity. Conscious breathing creates a pause, allowing for observation instead of instinct. This pause helps overcome ego and old destructive patterns effectively. Modern research supports slower breathing for stress reduction and relaxation. This simple technique aids in making better decisions in daily life.
